creator: chris@geonumerical.org
text:
I have been using fcron for years, and have version 3.0.6 installed. 
Recently I have noticed that it is not possible to install a users crontab,
for example:

fcrontab tab
17:56:08 installing file /usr/home/chris/tmp/tab for user chris
17:56:08 could not fflush() file_name: Bad file descriptor
Illegal instruction: 4

How-To-Repeat: Install fcron 3.0.6 from ports and try to install a new crontab.
